segments.text: Do you think Trenton's really going to have pony rides next year?
segments.speaker: S22

segments.text: Only one way to find out.
segments.speaker: S06

segments.text: Nice gift to Fenton, by the way.
segments.speaker: S05

segments.text: Hey, Brendon, do you know what would have been better?
segments.speaker: S22

segments.text: If there had been some special effects in there.
segments.speaker: S22

segments.text: It could have been better, but I didn't have time.
segments.speaker: S06

segments.text: Hey, I was just thinking, what if Jason jumps off a bridge onto a moving bus?
segments.speaker: S05

segments.text: And then me and you fight on top of the bus.
segments.speaker: S06

segments.text: And then I kick out a window on the bus and I climb on top?
segments.speaker: S05

segments.text: No, no, no, no. I got it. I got it.
segments.speaker: S22

segments.text: We climb up a telephone pole and fix the line.
segments.speaker: S22

segments.text: I do like where that's going a lot.
segments.speaker: S06

segments.text: Because then we can wear those hats.
segments.speaker: S22

segments.text: Or we climb up the telephone pole, Brendon, and Melissa gets electrocuted.
segments.speaker: S22

segments.text: And jump onto a helicopter, and then Melissa gets split in half.
segments.speaker: S22

segments.text: Why is something bad always happening to me?
segments.speaker: S05

segments.text: It's funnier when it happens to the girl.
segments.speaker: S06
